dialogueChunks.intro: Word has reached us about something valuable {location_hint}: a source of {quest_item} richer than anything we have seen in this region. Word is already spreading.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The problem is that the {enemy_type_plural} have claimed the area and are not giving ground. {quest_ally} spotted organized groups guarding the approaches. If we do not clear them out, someone else will claim {quest_focus_the} before we can.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone fast and capable to get out there and deal with the {enemy_type_plural} before it is too late. {player_name}, will you handle it?

dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} lost something irreplaceable. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_has} been missing and it means everything to them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The ones responsible were not ordinary opportunists. {quest_ally} found tracks leading {location_hint}, and the signs match the {enemy_type_plural} we have seen lurking near the borders. They need to be hunted down and destroyed before they move on.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus_The} means everything to {target_npc}. Kill the {enemy_type_plural} guarding it and bring it back, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_threat_animate_The} {quest_threat_animate_has} swept through the settlement, {player_name}. {quest_ally} says we need {quest_item} that can only be found at {quest_focus_the}, and our stores are empty.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} already worsening. The resources we need are deep in {enemy_type} territory {location_hint}. The creatures have been guarding the area aggressively, and no gathering party has made it through alive.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without clearing those {enemy_type_plural}, {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} in mortal danger. {player_name}, will you fight through before {quest_time_pressure}?

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, we know exactly where {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_is}. That is not the problem. The problem is what stands between us and it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} have turned the area {location_hint} into a killing ground. Two expeditions have already failed, and we lost good people on both. {quest_ally} says the creatures are territorial and will not leave on their own. Someone has to go in and clear them by force.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill the {enemy_type_plural} holding the approach and {quest_stakes_the} is ours. There will be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble.

dialogueChunks.intro: There is a window of opportunity, {player_name}, and it is closing fast. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been exposed by recent changes to the terrain, but the {enemy_type_plural} found it first.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, the creatures have been swarming {location_hint}. {quest_ally} believes they are attracted to the same thing we are after. If we wait much longer, they will be too entrenched to dislodge. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} at stake.
dialogueChunks.outro: Strike now while they are still disorganized. Kill enough {enemy_type_plural} to break their hold on the area.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, what I am about to tell you stays between us. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} more valuable than anyone in this settlement realizes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} and I have been researching it quietly, but the {enemy_type_plural} {location_hint} are the obstacle. They have been guarding the area since {quest_origin}, and they are vicious. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} worth the risk, but only if someone can handle the creatures.
dialogueChunks.outro: Eliminate the {enemy_type_plural} standing guard and we secure something that could transform this settlement's future.
